description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly faceted body and a black base. The surface is visibly worn, with patches of paint missing and scuffed areas, giving it a weathered, used appearance. A large, rectangular instructional label is affixed to the front, featuring white and red text and graphics that explain how to use the extinguisher. The top is fitted with a black handle and lever mechanism, which is angular and robust, designed for easy gripping and operation. There is no visible hose, but the nozzle is integrated into the handle assembly. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and visibility in emergency situations.
description: A weathered red fire extinguisher with a black handle and base, featuring a prominent instructional label and visible surface wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, handle, and lever clearly, with significant paint wear visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible and the handle seen from the end, highlighting the faceted body and worn paint.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the most extensive paint wear and the handle's full extension, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label edge just visible and the handle seen from the end, showing the black vertical seam.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular instructional label on the front, white and red with text and graphics.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Short black nozzle integrated into the handle assembly, no separate hose visible.
